auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code.
auth.sendCodeError: Couldn't send the code. Check your connection and try again.
auth.verifyError: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.

home.testErrorSentBody: A test error was reported to Sentry. Check the dashboard.

pair.introSubtitle: Plug the device into your car's OBD-II port, then scan the QR code on its label to connect it to your account.
pair.scanHint: Point your camera at the QR code on the device label.
pair.cameraDeniedBody: Caeorta uses the camera to scan your device's QR code. You can allow access, or enter the code by hand instead.
pair.manualSubtitle: Type the code printed under the QR on your device label.
pair.manualInvalid: Enter the device code from the label.
pair.successBody: Your Caeorta device is now linked to your account. You're ready to set it up.
pair.errNotFoundBody: We couldn't find a device for that code. Double-check the label and try scanning or entering it again.
pair.errAlreadyClaimedBody: This device is already paired to an account. If it should be yours, contact support to transfer it.
pair.errNetworkBody: Check your internet connection and try again.
pair.errUnauthorizedBody: Your session has expired. Go back and sign in again to pair your device.
pair.errGenericBody: We couldn't pair your device just now. Please try again.
